features: Amethyst by is one of the best unisex fragrances on the market, it’s luxurious and rich in aroma.
The projection of this scent is absolutely outstanding. It’s simple yet elegant.
This perfume presents a unique blend of classic spices and florals overlaid with the prominent base of sweet vanilla and oud while also offering you the classic notes of rose, jasmine, and bergamot.
If you want a fragrance that makes you feel like a million dollars this is it right here!
TOP NOTES: Bergamot and Pink Pepper, MIDDLE NOTES: Turkish Rose, Bulgarian Rose, and Jasmine, BASE NOTES: Vanilla, Amber, and Oud
description: Product description Badee Al Oud Amethyst Unisex For men and Women Eau De parfum 100ml Bade'e Al Oud Amethyst Perfumes is an Amber Vanilla fragrance for women and men. This is a new fragrance. Perfume Oud For Amethyst Eau de Parfum Perfumes is a warm fragrance with vanilla, amber and roses. The top note starts with spicy pink pepper and fresh bergamot. The heart note is floral with Turkish roses, Bulgarian roses and jasmine. Oudh, vanilla and amber perfectly round off the perfume in the base. Bade'e Al Oud Amethyst is an exceptionally successful blend of roses, Oudh and warm notes that is very suitable for any occasion. Recommendation for: women and men Contains denatured alcohol Quantity: 100ml Eau de perfume Bottle with a spray nozzle Top notes: Pink Pepper and Bergamot Middle notes: Turkish rose, Bulgarian Rose and Jasmine Base notes: Agarwood (Oud), Amber and Vanilla. Ingredients: Bergamot, Pink pepper, Turkish and Bulgarian rose, Jasmine, Agarwood, Amber and Vanilla. Directions Spray onto pulse points or other areas where the scent can be easily detected.
